title: Job Opening Category Manager at WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions!
